ocr_findings.description: Section heading icons rendered as text approximations: image shows colored circle bullet '○●' for 'フィールド' and '主キーに向いている列'; OCR renders '〇●' and '000' respectively — cosmetic only, no content loss.

reviewer_notes: Page covers database field and primary key concepts with one diagram (correctly replaced by image placeholder). All body text faithfully reproduced. The '000' rendering of the third section icon is cosmetic and does not affect meaning.
